title: Stranger
lyrics:
1 ContributorStranger LyricsThings don't feel so good when we're drifting apart
Even though I know how else to feel in my heart
Stuck inside my mind, I'm not good with words today
Wish I could invite you inside and take you all the way
I'm not trying to be a stranger to you, but I find myself running away from the truth
Life gets in the way, but I don't want things to change, I don't want things to change
I'm not trying to be a stranger to you, but I find myself running away from the truth
Life gets in the way, but I don't want things to change, I don't want things to change
I don't want to hurt you, I'd rather hurt me
I've already got wounds and they go so deep
But you'll never see, see
I don't want to hurt you, I'd rather hurt me
I've already got wounds and they go so deep
But you'll never see, see
I'm not trying to be a stranger to you, but I find myself running away from the truth
Life gets in the way, but I don't want things to change, I don't want things to change
I'm not trying to be a stranger to you, but I find myself running away from the truth
Life gets in the way, but I don't want things to change, I don't want things to change
